heading: Use of national private sector networks in emergency response
label: 321h Use of national private sector networks in emergency response
text: To the maximum extent practicable, the Secretary shall use national private sector networks and infrastructure for emergency response to chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, or explosive disasters, and other major disasters.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 318 of this titlePub. L. 109–295
